review_title: Reliable and Easy-to-Use Backup Solution for Virtual Environments
description: Overall, my experience with Vinchin Backup & Recovery has been positive. The software works reliably for protecting virtual machines and managing backup jobs. It is especially useful for organizations that need a simple yet effective backup solution for virtualization platforms. The management interface is straightforward, and once configured properly, the backup process runs smoothly. With some improvements in documentation and error reporting, it could become an even stronger backup solution for enterprise environments.
author: Vinsensius A.
pros: Vinchin Backup & Recovery provides an easy-to-use interface and reliable backup performance for virtualized environments. It supports multiple virtualization platforms such as VMware, Hyper-V, and other hypervisors, which makes it very flexible for different infrastructures. The backup and restore processes are straightforward, and the system provides useful features like incremental backup, instant VM recovery, and centralized management. The installation and configuration process is relatively simple compared to other enterprise backup solutions.
cons: Some advanced configuration options and documentation could be improved to make troubleshooting easier for administrators. In certain situations, error messages are not very detailed, which may require contacting technical support to fully understand the issue. The interface could also be improved slightly to make storage configuration and disk detection more intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Native CDP Policy that can automatically take over in less than a minute.
description: Our servers are running in different virtualization platforms in a hybrid environments and having this backup and restore solution makes as easy to manage everything.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the feature that we like about the product is the CDP backup job that automatically take over, allowing the standby machine to take over operations within 30 seconds.
cons: We haven't found any that we dislike about the product so far. All the features that we think a product must have are in this product
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: nearly identical to 100 other products with equally forgettable names

pros: nothing really differentiates this product from any other. it's like how every bank offers the same exact 'features' and every home insurance and car insurance and health insurance and everything else in your life is identical. does backup program things, box checked, lets move on
cons: the price. i just cant bring myself to pay actual money for something that is essentially an elaborate gui for rsync. i actually, and i'm not making this up, used Claude AI to write a python script that just maps the datastores off the host server via sshfs and tar/zstandard's them. saved me like $20,000 which of course i don't actually get but -- neither do you.

description: Overall a reliable backup solution with easy setup and solid VM recovery features. Good experience so far. Stable backups and straightforward management. A dependable backup solution with good performance and usability.
author: Lucas D.
pros: Easy setup, reliable backups, and good support for virtual environments. Simple interface and fast recovery process. Very stable solution. Good VM backup performance and easy management dashboard. Reliable backups with quick recovery and straightforward configuration. Efficient VM protection and simple deployment. Works very well. User-friendly interface and strong virtualization backup features. Fast backup speeds and dependable disaster recovery tools. Easy to configure and manage with solid backup reliability.

review_title: Reliable and Easy-to-Use VM Backup Solution
description: Overall, my experience with Vinchin Backup & Recovery has been very positive. It provides reliable backup and restore functionality and helps ensure that our virtual machines are protected. The installation process was straightforward and the system runs consistently without major issues. It’s a solid solution for companies that need dependable VM backup and recovery.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is easy to set up and the interface is very clear, which makes managing backups simple even for smaller IT teams. I especially like the reliable VM backup and the fast recovery options. It integrates well with different virtualization platforms and runs very stable once configured.
cons: Some advanced configuration options could be explained better in the documentation. The interface is good overall, but a few settings are a bit hidden at first and take some time to learn.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Solid Multi-Hypervisor Backup That Actually Works for Proxmox and XCP-ng
description: Overall, Vinchin has been a solid, no-nonsense tool for managing our hybrid environment, especially since it handles Proxmox and XCP-ng natively without the usual agent-pushing headaches. It’s reliable and the 'Instant VM Recovery' is a massive stress-reliever during outages, though it still feels like a work in progress when it comes to Microsoft 365 and deep API automation. It’s not perfect, but for on-prem virtualization and disaster recovery, it definitely gets the job done without overcomplicating things.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best part is definitely the native, agentless support for multiple hypervisors like Proxmox and XCP-ng all in one console. It saves me from the headache of managing agents across different platforms, and the Instant VM Recovery actually works as advertised, I can get a failed VM back online directly from the backup storage in under two minutes when things go sideways.
cons: The Microsoft 365 integration feels a bit half-baked compared to its solid on-prem performance, and it's annoying that physical server backups still require OS-level agents. Also, the API documentation isn't quite there yet, which makes custom DevOps automation more of a chore than it should be.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
